introSection: Frozen Coaster is a travelling steel kiddie roller coaster built by Turkish manufacturer Güven Lunapark located in the United Kingdom. It is operated by Reece Wheatley and has a theme based on the Disney film Frozen, released in 2013.

sections.title: History
sections.content: First known to have operated in December 2016 at Reading's winter wonderland. It operated at the Kirkcaldy Links Market in Scotland, UK from April 19 to April 24, 2017 and at the Hoppings from June 16 to June 24.

sections.title: Trains
sections.content: The front of the train is shaped like Frozen character Olaf.

fullText:
Frozen Coaster is a travelling steel kiddie roller coaster built by Turkish manufacturer Güven Lunapark located in the United Kingdom. It is operated by Reece Wheatley and has a theme based on the Disney film Frozen, released in 2013.

First known to have operated in December 2016 at Reading's winter wonderland. It operated at the Kirkcaldy Links Market in Scotland, UK from April 19 to April 24, 2017 and at the Hoppings from June 16 to June 24.



The front of the train is shaped like Frozen character Olaf.
